title: Integrate Redis Caching for Dictionary and Migration Pages
description:
Integrate Redis caching into DataTools V2 (Laravel) to improve performance for read-heavy Dictionary and Migration pages. These pages are frequently accessed and rarely updated, making them ideal candidates for Redis-based caching.

### Scope
- Dictionary page object and field list caching
- Migration page caching
- Object field list caching

### Benefits
- Reduced database load
- Improved page response times under concurrent usage
- Better scalability
acceptance_criteria: Dictionary page data is cached in Redis
Migration page data is cached in Redis
middleware_changes: Redis caching layer added for dictionary, migration, and object field list queries in Laravel.
implementation_notes: Redis integrated on localhost first, then extended to dictionary, migration, and object field list. Windows: start Redis via services.msc.
comment_summary: Waqar integrated Redis caching for dictionary on localhost, then extended to dictionary, migration, and object field lists. Documented how to start Redis on local Windows machines.
